categories.name: Ways to preserve food (v/s throwing it)
Kitchen scraps that can be repurposed
Harms of food waste in landfills
Regional Indian dishes made from leftover rice

fun_fact: Indian households waste 78.2 million tons of food every year - and that's not good for climate change. But as Indians, the practice of not wasting food is already deep-rooted in our culture. It's time we re-embrace it. Avoiding food waste is one of the simplest switches we can make to help fight climate change. Watch →
author: Shyamoli G
